name: Brogy
description:
__Height:__ 2130 cm (69'10")
__Affiliation:__ Giant Warrior Pirates (Former)
__Bounty:__ ~!100,000,000!~

Brogy the Red Ogre is one of the two legendary giants who fight an endless battle on Little Garden, an island in the Grand Line. Each giant has a bounty of 100,000,000 on their heads.
